user_query: I completely forgot about souvenirs. Add a stop at Roots or the Hudson's Bay flagship on Day 10 morning before the CN Tower. I need to grab gifts before I fly out.

fields.name: Hudson's Bay Flagship Store
fields.description: Visit the iconic Canadian department store flagship for high-quality souvenirs and gifts, including the famous multi-stripe blankets and Roots apparel.

result.reasoning: The user wants to add a shopping stop on Day 10 morning before the CN Tower. Since the CN Tower restaurant is the first existing item for Day 10 in the context, position 0 is used to place this activity at the start of the day.
